dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the dataset for a Mask Grounding DINO experiment.

fixed_padding.description: A flag specifying whether to resize the image (with no padding) to (sorted(scales[-1]), random_resize_max_size) to prevent a CPU memory leak.
fixed_padding.title: fixed padding

fixed_random_crop.description: A flag to enable Large Scale Jittering, which is used for ViT backbones. The resulting image resolution is fixed to fixed_random_crop.
fixed_random_crop.title: fixed random crop

horizontal_flip_prob.description: The probability for horizonal flip during training
horizontal_flip_prob.title: horizontal flip probability

input_mean.description: The input mean for RGB frames
input_mean.title: input mean per pixel

input_std.description: The input standard deviation per pixel for RGB frames
input_std.title: input std per pixel

random_resize_max_size.description: The maximum random resize size for training data
random_resize_max_size.title: random resize max size

scales.description: A list of sizes to perform random resize.
scales.title: scales

test_random_resize.description: The random resize size for test data
test_random_resize.title: random resize max size

train_random_crop_max.description: The maximum random crop size for training data. Must be > train_random_crop_min
train_random_crop_max.title: Maximum random crop size

train_random_crop_min.description: The minimum random crop size for training data
train_random_crop_min.title: minumum random crop size

train_random_resize.description: A list of sizes to perform random resize for training data
train_random_resize.title: train random resize dimensions

batch_size.description: The batch size for training and validation
batch_size.title: batch size

dataset_type.description: If set to default, we follow the standard map-style dataset structure from torch which loads ODVG annotation in every subprocess. This leads to redudant copy of data and can cause RAM to explod if `workers` is high. If set to serialized, the data is serialized through pickle and `torch.Tensor` that allows the data to be shared across subprocess. As a result, RAM usage can be greatly improved.
dataset_type.title: dataset type

eval_class_ids.description: IDs of the classes for evaluation.
eval_class_ids.title: eval class ids

has_mask.description: Flag to load mask annotation from dataset.
has_mask.title: has mask

infer_data_sources.description:
The data source for inference:
* image_dir : Parent directory containing inference images
* json_file : Path to JSON file with image_path+caption pairs (VG only)
* data_type : Dataset type (VG, OD)
* captions  : Class list string (OD only)
infer_data_sources.title: infer data sources

max_labels.description: The total number of labels to sample from. After sampling positive labels, we randomly sample negative samples so that total number of labels equal to `max_labels`. For detection dataset, negative labels are categories not present in the image. For grounding dataset, negative labels are phrases in the original caption not present in the image. Setting higher `max_labels` may improve robustness of the model with the cost of longer training time.
max_labels.title: max labels

pin_memory.description: Flag to enable the dataloader to allocated pagelocked memory for faster of data between the CPU and GPU.
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

quant_calibration_data_sources.description:
The data source for quantization calibration:
* image_dir : The directory that contains the quantization calibration images
* json_file(optional) : The path of the JSON file, which uses quantization calibration-annotation COCO format
quant_calibration_data_sources.title: quantization calibration data sources

test_data_sources.description:
The data source for testing:
* image_dir : The directory that contains the test images
* json_file : The path of the JSON file, which uses test-annotation COCO format.
* data_type : The type of the dataset, OD or VG.
test_data_sources.title: test data sources

train_data_sources.description:
The list of data sources for training:
* image_dir : The directory that contains the training images
* json_file : The path of the JSONL file, which uses training-annotation ODVG format
* label_map: (Optional) The path of the label mapping only required for detection dataset
train_data_sources.title: train data sources

val_data_sources.description:
The data source for validation:
* image_dir : The directory that contains the validation images
* json_file : The path of the JSON file, which uses validation-annotation COCO format.
* data_type : The type of the dataset, OD or VGNote that category id needs to start from 0 if we want to calculate validation loss.
Run Data Services annotation convert to making the categories contiguous.
val_data_sources.title: validation data sources

workers.description: The number of parallel workers processing data
workers.title: batch size

gen_trt_engine.description: Configurable parameters to construct the TensorRT engine builder for a Mask Grounding DINO experiment.

batch_size.description:
The batch size of the input Tensor for the engine.
                    A value of :code:`-1` implies dynamic tensor shapes.
batch_size.title: Batch size

gpu_id.description: The index of the GPU to build the TensorRT engine.
gpu_id.title: GPU ID

onnx_file.description: Path to the ONNX model file.
onnx_file.title: ONNX file

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

tensorrt.description: Hyper parameters to configure the TensorRT Engine builder.

data_type.description: The precision to be set for building the TensorRT engine.
data_type.title: data type

layers_precision.description: The list to specify layer precision.
layers_precision.title: layers_precision

max_batch_size.description:
The maximum batch size in the optimization profile for
                    the input tensor of the TensorRT engine.
max_batch_size.title: Maximum batch size

min_batch_size.description:
The minimum batch size in the optimization profile for
                    the input tensor of the TensorRT engine.
min_batch_size.title: Min batch size

opt_batch_size.description:
The optimum batch size in the optimization profile for
                    the input tensor of the TensorRT engine.
opt_batch_size.title: Optimum batch size

workspace_size.description:
The size (in MB) of the workspace TensorRT has
                    to run it's optimization tactics and generate the
                    TensorRT engine.
workspace_size.title: Max workspace size

tensorrt.title: TensorRT hyper params.

timing_cache.description:
Path to a TensorRT timing cache that speeds up engine generation.
                    This will be created/read/updated.
timing_cache.title: TensorRT timing cache

trt_engine.description:
Path to the TensorRT engine generated should be stored.
                    This only works with :code:`tao-deploy`.
trt_engine.title: TensorRT engine

verbose.description: Flag to enable verbose TensorRT logging.
verbose.title: Verbose

model.description: Configurable parameters to construct the model for a Mask Grounding DINO experiment.

aux_loss.description:
A flag specifying whether to use auxiliary
                    decoding losses (loss at each decoder layer)
aux_loss.title: Train backbone

backbone.description:
The backbone name of the model.
                    TAO implementation of DINO support Swin and ResNet50.
backbone.title: backbone

backbone_names.description: Prefix of the tensor names corresponding to the backbone.
backbone_names.title: Backbone tensor name prefix

bbox_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the L1 error of the bounding box coordinates in the final loss.
bbox_loss_coef.title: BBox loss coefficient

class_embed_bias.description: Flag to set bias in the contrastive embedding.
class_embed_bias.title: Class embedding bias

cls_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the classification error in the final loss.
cls_loss_coef.title: Class loss coefficient

dec_layers.description: Number of decoder layers in the transformer (fixed at 6 for Mask Grounding DINO)
dec_layers.title: decoder layers

dec_n_points.description: Number of reference points in the decoder.
dec_n_points.title: decoder n points

dice_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the dice loss of the segmentation in the final loss.
dice_loss_coef.title: GIoU loss coefficient

dilation.description: A flag specifying whether enable dilation or not in the backbone.
dilation.title: Dilation enabled.

dn_box_noise_scale.description: The scale of noise applied to boxes during contrastive de-noising. If this value is 0, noise is not applied.
dn_box_noise_scale.title: Denoised boxes noise scaling

dn_label_noise_ratio.description:
The scale of the noise applied to labels during
                       contrastive denoising. If this value is 0, then noise is
                       no applied.
dn_label_noise_ratio.title: denoise label noise ratio

dn_number.description: The number of denoising queries in DINO.
dn_number.title: denoising number

dropout_ratio.description: The probability to drop hidden units.
dropout_ratio.title: drop out ratio

enc_layers.description: Number of encoder layers in the transformer (fixed at 6 for Mask Grounding DINO)
enc_layers.title: encoder layers

enc_n_points.description: Number of reference points in the encoder.
enc_n_points.title: encoder n points

fix_refpoints_hw.description:
If this value is -1, width and height are learned seperately for each box.
                    If this value is -2, a shared width and height are learned.
                    A value greater than 0 specifies learning with a fixed number.
fix_refpoints_hw.title: fix refpoints hw

focal_alpha.description: The alpha value in the focal loss.
focal_alpha.title: focal alpha

focal_gamma.description: The gamma value in the focal loss.
focal_gamma.title: focal gamma

giou_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the GIoU loss of the bounding box in the final loss.
giou_loss_coef.title: GIoU loss coefficient

has_mask.description: Flag to enable mask head in grounding dino.
has_mask.title: has mask

log_scale.description:
[Optional] The initial value of a learnable parameter to multiply with the similarity
                    matrix to normalize the output. Defaults to None.
                    - If set to 'auto', the similarity matrix will be normalized by
                    a fixed value ``sqrt(d_c)`` where ``d_c`` is the channel number.
                    - If set to 'none' or ``None``, there is no normalization applied.
log_scale.title: log scale

loss_types.description: Losses to be used during training
loss_types.title: loss_types

mask_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the mask error in the final loss.
mask_loss_coef.title: Mask loss coefficient

num_feature_levels.description: The number of feature levels to use in the model
num_feature_levels.title: number of feature levels

num_select.description: The number of top-K predictions selected during post-process. Must be < num_queries * num_classes
num_select.title: num select

pe_temperatureH.description: The temperature applied to the height dimension of the positional sine embedding.
pe_temperatureH.title: pe_temperatureH

pe_temperatureW.description: The temperature applied to the width dimension of the positional sine embedding.
pe_temperatureW.title: pe_temperatureW

pre_norm.description: Flag to add layer norm in the encoder or not.
pre_norm.title: Pre norm

pretrained_backbone_path.description: [Optional] Path to a pretrained backbone file.
pretrained_backbone_path.title: pretrained backbone path

rela_minimap_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the minimap error in the final loss.
rela_minimap_loss_coef.title: Rela minimap loss coefficient

rela_nt_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the no target error in the final loss.
rela_nt_loss_coef.title: Rela no target loss coefficient

rela_union_mask_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the mask error in the final loss.
rela_union_mask_loss_coef.title: Rela union mask loss coefficient

return_interm_indices.description: The index of feature levels to use in the model. The length must match `num_feature_levels`.
return_interm_indices.title: return interim indices

set_cost_bbox.description: The relative weight of the L1 error of the bounding box coordinates in the matching cost.
set_cost_bbox.title: Set cost BBox

set_cost_class.description: The relative weight of the classification error in the matching cost.
set_cost_class.title: Set cost classification

set_cost_giou.description: The relative weight of the GIoU loss of the bounding box in the matching cost.
set_cost_giou.title: Set cost GIoU

text_encoder_type.description:
BERT encoder type. If only the name of the type is provided,
                    the weight is download from the HuggingFace Hub.
                    If a path is provided, then we load the weight from the local path.
text_encoder_type.title: Text encoder type

train_backbone.description:
Flag to set backbone weights as trainable or frozen.
                    When set to `False`, the backbone weights will be frozen.
train_backbone.title: Train backbone

two_stage_type.description: Type of two stage in DINO
two_stage_type.title: two stage type

use_dn.description: A flag specifying whether to enbable contrastive de-noising training in DINO
use_dn.title: use denoising

model_name.description: Name of model if invoking task via :code:`model_agnostic`
model_name.title: Model name

quantize.description: Configurable parameters to run model quantization for a Mask Grounding DINO experiment.

algorithm.description: Calibration/optimization algorithm. Used by ModelOpt backends (modelopt.pytorch and modelopt.onnx). Ignored by torchao backend.
algorithm.title: Calibration algorithm

backend_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the backend
backend_kwargs.title: Backend kwargs

device.description: Device to use for calibration. Accepts 'cuda' (uses default GPU), 'cpu', 'trt' (TensorRT for ONNX backend), or specific GPU device like 'cuda:0', 'cuda:1', etc. If 'cuda' is specified but no GPU is available, the framework will automatically fall back to 'cpu'. Note: 'trt' is only supported by the modelopt.onnx backend for ONNX Runtime with TensorRT execution provider.
device.title: Calibration device

layers.description: List of per-module quantization configurations. Each entry specifies which modules to quantize and their data types. This is the primary way to configure quantization.
layers.title: Layer quantization configs

model_path.description: Path to the model to be quantized. For ONNX backend, path to ONNX file.
model_path.title: Model path

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

skip_names.description: List of module/layer names or patterns to exclude from quantization
skip_names.title: Skip names

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the trainer for a Mask Grounding DINO experiment.

activation_checkpoint.description:
A True value instructs train to recompute in backward pass to save GPU memory,
        rather than storing activations.
activation_checkpoint.title: enable activation checkpointing

checkpoint_interval.description: The interval (in epochs) at which a checkpoint will be saved. Helps resume training.
checkpoint_interval.title: Checkpoint interval

checkpoint_interval_unit.description: The unit of the checkpoint interval.
checkpoint_interval_unit.title: Checkpoint interval unit

clip_grad_norm.description:
Amount to clip the gradient by L2 Norm.
        A value of 0.0 specifies no clipping.
clip_grad_norm.title: clip gradient norm

distributed_strategy.description:
The multi-GPU training strategy.
        DDP (Distributed Data Parallel) and Fully Sharded DDP are supported.
distributed_strategy.title: distributed_strategy

freeze.description:
List of layer names to freeze.
        Example: ["backbone", "transformer.encoder", "input_proj"].
freeze.title: freeze

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the training on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in train.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

is_dry_run.description:
Whether to run the trainer in Dry Run mode. This serves
        as a good means to validate the spec file and run a sanity check on the trainer
        without actually initializing and running the trainer.
is_dry_run.title: Is dry run

num_epochs.description: Number of epochs to run the training.
num_epochs.title: Number of epochs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the train job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the training on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

optim.description: Hyper parameters to configure the optimizer.

lr.description: The initial learning rate for training the model, excluding the backbone.
lr.title: learning rate

lr_backbone.description: The initial learning rate for training the backbone.
lr_backbone.title: learning rate - backbone

lr_decay.description: The decreasing factor for the learning rate scheduler.
lr_decay.title: learning rate decay

lr_linear_proj_mult.description: The initial learning rate for training the linear projection layer.
lr_linear_proj_mult.title: learning rate - linear projection

lr_scheduler.description:
The learning scheduler:
                    * MultiStep : Decrease the lr by lr_decay from lr_steps
                    * StepLR : Decrease the lr by lr_decay at every lr_step_size.
lr_scheduler.title: learning rate scheduler

lr_step_size.description: The number of steps to decrease the learning rate in the StepLR.
lr_step_size.title: learning rate step size

lr_steps.description:
The steps at which the learning rate must be decreased.
                    This is applicable only with the MultiStep LR.
lr_steps.title: learning rate decay steps

momentum.description: The momentum for the AdamW optimizer.
momentum.title: momentum - AdamW

monitor_name.description: The metric value to be monitored for the :code:`AutoReduce` Scheduler.
monitor_name.title: monitor_name

optimizer.description: Type of optimizer used to train the network.

optim.title: optimizer

precision.description: Precision to run the training on.
precision.title: precision

pretrained_model_path.description: Path to a pre-trained Deformable DETR model to initialize the current training from.

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

resume_training_checkpoint_path.description: Path to the checkpoint to resume training from.
resume_training_checkpoint_path.title: Resume checkpoint path

seed.description: The seed for the initializer in PyTorch. If < 0, disable fixed seed.
seed.title: Seed for randomization

validation_interval.description:
The interval (in epochs) at which a evaluation
        will be triggered on the validation dataset.
validation_interval.title: Validation interval
